Workers limits

Below are the account plan limits observed on the Cloudflare Workers Free plan. Source: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/platform/limits/

Service Offer type Card required Paid dependencies Requests per day CPU time Memory Subrequests per request Worker size Workers per account Cron Triggers per account Static asset files Static asset file size
Cloudflare Workers always_free No No 100,000/day 10 ms 128 MB 50/request 3 MB 100 5 20,000 25 MiB
